case_title: CHO, HAE OK vs. RAY, TONEY K. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHO, HAE OK AS TO DEFENDANT RAY, TONEY K. RAY, ANN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-19-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-30-1993

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAY, TONEY K. RAY, ANN $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,000.00, JUDGMENT TO BE PAID AT THE RATE OF $2,000.00 WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM DEC 10, 1993 & COMMENCING ON 2-10-94, PAYMENT OF FIVE HUNDRED DOLLARS $500.00 OR MORE, PER MONTH, UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. INTEREST WILL CONTINUE TO RUN AT THE RATE OF 10% ON THE DECLINING BALANCE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. HEARING SET FOR OCT-04-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHO, HAE OK

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/GARY KAPLAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/MATTHEW CARGAL AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - DEF. TO PAY PL. $7,000 PRINCIPAL BY A PAYMENT PLAN OF $2,000 WITHIN 30 DAYS & $500 MO. PMT, THEREAFTER, ON THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING 2-10-94 WITH 10% ON THE DECLINING BALANCE - 5 DAY GRACE PERIOD - PMT. TO BE MADE TO PL. ATTY. BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER - IF PMT. IS NOT MADE, PL. MAY EXECUTE ON JUDG- MENT WITH 48 HRS GIVEN TO DEF. & DECLARACTION SUBMITTED TO THE COURT - NO COSTS & ATTY. FEES. PL. ATTY. TOA PREPARE JUDGMENT.
